header.headline: IR JSON Walkthrough
header.subtitle: A JSON walkthrough should connect structure fields to the eventual runtime artifacts they drive.

stage_1.title: Source Contract
stage_1.body: IR JSON Walkthrough begins with a high-level intent or graph contract that must remain visible.

stage_2.title: IR Structure
stage_2.body: The diagram should surface the intermediate structure that preserves the key semantic boundaries.

stage_3.title: Lowering Choice
stage_3.body: Lowering decisions determine what survives into codegen and what collapses into opaque runtime steps.

stage_4.title: Artifact Output
stage_4.body: The endpoint is a set of runtime-facing artifacts whose lineage should still be readable.

formula.title: Technical Rule
formula.equation: json fields -> ir nodes -> runtime artifacts

left.title: IR Artifact
left.body: Expose one concrete artifact or schema view produced by the IR path.

right.title: Runtime Artifact
right.body: Connect the IR choice to emitted runtime files, kernels, or reports.

footer.note: IR JSON Walkthrough belongs in the broader contract because the model needs dense technical layouts, not only charts and posters.
